enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a casual vlog update about getting his Mac back, his daily routine in Boulder, and listening to an audiobook ('The History of Food') at double speed using a speaker his mom gave him. He mentions working on a webpage and briefly notes he tried to record a vlog the night before but was too tired.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.topic: listening to audiobooks at double speed
stances.position: likes it — says you still understand everything and get through books faster
positive — says you can hear it perfectly in the corner
